title: Ubiquiti NanoBeam M5-16, outdoor, 5GHz MIMO, 2x 16dBi, AirMAX
description: NanoBeam NBE-M5-16 is a powerful completely outdoor unit including 2x 16dBi (2x2 MIMO) antennas for the 5GHz band as a CPE solution suitable for shorter distances. The unit allows transmission speed up to 300Mbps The form factor of the NanoBeam® features the highest gain for its size . The NanoBeamâs excellent beam directivity provides the best performance in high-noise environments Ubiquitiâs airMAX® technology is proven in millions of deployments worldwide, exhibiting outstanding performance in outdoor environments. The TDMA airMAX protocol enables unprecedented scalability, high throughput and low latency in multipoint networks Device PoE power adapter Power cord Metal strap Lock ring + ball joint mount
